name: Improper Handling of Highly Compressed Data (Data Amplification)
description: The product does not properly handle or restrict the decompression of highly compressed data (decompression bombs), allowing a small compressed input to expand into an enormously large output that exhausts memory, disk, or CPU resources.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node accepts compressed data that flows to a TRANSFORM[decompress] node without a CONTROL node enforcing maximum decompression ratio, output size limits, or resource consumption bounds before the decompressed data reaches STORAGE or further TRANSFORM nodes
